brief_summary: Implement control-plane v5.1.0 audit trail across 6 slices: first-class findings, delegation ledger, query-time join, /api/task + /api/metrics, control-report CLI, tool-target redaction, dashboard revamp
Independent validation of the v5.1.0 audit-trail diff: additive-API-only, stdlib-only, no gate reads the DB, 127.0.0.1 preserved, all seven eval suites green
Security review of tool-target redaction (AC7): confirm memory redactor runs before truncation so a key straddling the 200-char cutoff is still caught; no bodies indexed
